scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:watershed-package && npm run test:portable-optics
scripts.test:watershed-package: rm -rf /tmp/lerms-watershed-package-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir /tmp/lerms-watershed-package-tests --noEmit false src/contracts/first-vertical.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills.ts src/fluid/kaminos-fluid-package-consumer.ts src/fluid/hill-kaminos-runtime-exercise.ts src/fluid/hill-kaminos-phase-morph-recipe.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-fluid-package-adapter.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-portable-optical-geometry-adapter.ts tests/watershed-package-consumer-contracts.ts tests/watershed-installed-package-runtime-contracts.ts tests/watershed-phase-morph-runtime-contracts.ts tests/watershed-portable-optical-geometry-adapter-contracts.ts && node /tmp/lerms-watershed-package-tests/tests/watershed-package-consumer-contracts.js && node /tmp/lerms-watershed-package-tests/tests/watershed-installed-package-runtime-contracts.js && node /tmp/lerms-watershed-package-tests/tests/watershed-phase-morph-runtime-contracts.js && node /tmp/lerms-watershed-package-tests/tests/watershed-portable-optical-geometry-adapter-contracts.js
scripts.test:portable-optics: out=/tmp/lerms-portable-optics-test-$$ && tsc --target ES2022 --module ESNext --moduleResolution Bundler --resolveJsonModule --allowSyntheticDefaultImports --skipLibCheck --outDir "$out" --noEmit false tests/watershed-portable-optical-provider-consumer-contracts.ts && cp package.json package-lock.json "$out/" && ln -s "$PWD/node_modules" "$out/node_modules" && node "$out/tests/watershed-portable-optical-provider-consumer-contracts.js"
scripts.test:contracts: rm -rf /tmp/lerms-contract-tests && tsc --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir /tmp/lerms-contract-tests --noEmit false src/contracts/first-vertical.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-worker-client.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-preview-bench-payload.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-terrain-sample-packet.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-overlay-style.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-material-fray.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-transition-law.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-transition-preview-style.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-placement-affordance.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-growth-meadow-shader-sketch.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-semantic-placement-field.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-preview-settings.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-preview-shading.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-param-settings.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-diagnostic-presets.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-phase-filmstrip.ts tests/first-vertical-contracts.ts tests/hill-of-hills-terrain.ts tests/hill-of-hills-worker-contracts.ts tests/hill-of-hills-phase-filmstrip-contracts.ts && node /tmp/lerms-contract-tests/tests/first-vertical-contracts.js && node /tmp/lerms-contract-tests/tests/hill-of-hills-terrain.js && node scripts.witness:hill-preview-bench-payload: rm -rf /tmp/lerms-hill-preview-bench-payload && tsc --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir /tmp/lerms-hill-preview-bench-payload --noEmit false src/contracts/first-vertical.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-preview-bench-payload.ts && node /tmp/lerms-hill-preview-bench-payload/terrain/hill-of-hills-preview-bench-payload.js
scripts.witness:hill-terrain-sample-packet: rm -rf /tmp/lerms-hill-terrain-sample-packet && tsc --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir /tmp/lerms-hill-terrain-sample-packet --noEmit false src/contracts/first-vertical.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-terrain-sample-packet.ts && node /tmp/lerms-hill-terrain-sample-packet/terrain/hill-of-hills-terrain-sample-packet.js
scripts.witness:hill-motion-affordance-packet: rm -rf /tmp/lerms-hill-motion-affordance-packet && tsc --target ES2022 --module ES2022 --moduleResolution Bundler --outDir /tmp/lerms-hill-motion-affordance-packet --noEmit false src/contracts/first-vertical.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills.ts src/terrain/hill-of-hills-terrain-sample-packet.ts && node /tmp/lerms-hill-motion-affordance-packet/terrain/hill-of-hills-terrain-sample-packet.js --motion-affordance
